title: August 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 14''' is the 226th day of the year (227th in leap years). There are 139 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[John Costanza]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Corey Dee Williams]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Misty Rosas]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Zack Whedon]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 129|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 129]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 89|''Star Wars'' (1977) 89]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 11|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 11]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 33|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 33]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] premieres in Australian and German theatres.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 8|''Star Wars'' (2013) 8]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Far Horizons]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Lost Legacies]]'' released at [[Gen Con Game Fair]].
*2014 – ''[[Onslaught at Arda I]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Surface Details]]'' released on '''swtor.com'''.
*[[2017]] – "[[Escape from Coruscant]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – [[Target Vader 2|''Target Vader'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures Annual 2019|''Star Wars Adventures Annual'' 2019]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The High Republic Adventures Free Comic Book Day 2021]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic – The Edge of Balance/Guardians of the Whills]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – Episodes 1 - 11 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures|Young Jedi Adventures]]'' [[Young Jedi Adventures Season Two|Season Two]] premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2024 – "[[Heroes and Hotshots / A Jedi or a Pirate]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2024 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 49|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 49]] published.
<noinclude>
